parents.subject: LU-14930 mdt: abort_recov_mdt shouldn't abort client recovery

commit.subject: LU-00000 tests: perform full test group on ARM client
commit.message:
LU-00000 tests: perform full test group on ARM client

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientarch=aarch64 testgroup=full-part-1

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientarch=aarch64 testgroup=full-part-2

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientarch=aarch64 testgroup=full-part-3

Change-Id: Ia1a0353e6606519164563e6e3ceae6f7b32ba977
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
